dialogue:
[A] Hi there, how are you? I'm looking for movie recommendations.
[B] I am doing okay. What kind of movies do you like?
[A] I like animations like The Triplets of Belleville (2003) and Waking Life (2001). I also enjoy Mary and Max (2009). Anything artistic.
[B] You might like The Boss Baby (2017) that was a good movie.
[A] What's it about?
[B] It has Alec Baldwin it is about a baby that works for a company and gets adopted it is very funny.
[A] That seems like a nice comedy. Do you have any animated recommendations that are a bit more dramatic? Like A Scanner Darkly  (2006) for example. I like comedies but I prefer films with a little more depth.
[B] That is a tough one but I will remember something. Final Fantasy: The Spirits Within (2001) was a good one.
[A] Ooh that seems cool! Thanks for the input. I'm ready to submit if you are.
[B] It is animated, sci fi, and has action. Glad I could help.
[A] Nice. Take care, cheers!
[B] bye.

[A] Hi, did you see Scarface  (1983) ?
[B] Yes it was a pretty good movie.
[A] Then you would like The Godfather  if you haven't seen it. You like Sci Fi stuff like Star Wars ?
[B] I am more of a Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones (2002) kind of person.
[A] Did you see any of the Star Wars parody movies? Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones (2002) was pretty funny?
[B] I do not think I have seen that one. Who is in it?
[A] Have you seen any cartoon movies like South Park ?
[B] Yes those are really funny. I think I will watch Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones (2002). Thanks for the recommendation.
[A] Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones (2002) r Wars Clones is a claymation movie.
[B] That sounds great.
[A] It is. You like blood and gore movies? If so, you might like From Dusk till Dawn (1996) .
[B] No I do not like that genre of movie. The star wars movie is perfect for me.
[A] You not a Twilight Zone: The Movie (1983) fan are you? Those films creep me out.
[B] I found the movie I would like to watch. Thanks for all the help.
[A] Oh okay. Enemy of the State  (1998) was a good tech film if you're into that genre. How do we submit?
[B] click the hide/show movie forms and fill the movie questions rows then it will let you submit. I hope you have a great night. bye.
[A] Thanks.

[A] Avatar  It is a nice movie. What say? Avatar  (2009) Was a marvelous 3D experience personally for me.
[B] I really liked that movie but haven't seen it in a while. Are you a Michelle Rodriquez fan?
[A] No. I am not. I like sci-fi movies. Have you watched The Martian  (2015). My another favorite sci-fi movies are Contact  (2009) and Donnie Darko (2001).
[B] No I have not seen that one but have seen all the Star Wars movies. Do you like those.
[A] Yes, I love Star Wars series. In fact I am excited about the upcoming Star Wars. What are you favorite movies?
[B] I am too I think you will like Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008).
[A] I have not seen Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008). I will watch it soon.
[B] It is a good movie if you like Star wars you should like it.
[A] Great. I will watch those. Now, let us submit this. Nice talking to you, have a nice day!
[B] Thanks it was nice talking to you too bye.

[A] I'm in the mood to watch a romantic comedy.  What do you suggest?
[B] 50 First Dates (2004). Have you seen that one?
[A] Oh, I've seen that one.  I really like Drew Barrymore.
[B] Yes she is good, I am looking for a super hero movie myself. Do you like The Wedding Singer (1998).
[A] Drew Barrymore was in Charlie's Angels .  Do you think that counts as a superhero movie?
[B] Yeah, definitely. I liked that one.
[A] Oh, The Wedding Singer (1998) is a good one.  Sandler and Barrymore are great together.  I'm very excited to finally see Blended  (2014).
[B] Oh I have heard good things about that film.
[A] I also liked Barrymore in Ever After (1998).
[B] That is one film I should definitely check out.

[B] Hello.
[A] Hello. What movie would you suggest to watch.
[B] Get Out (2017). Have you seen that movie before?
[A] I love that scary movies. I love Annabelle  (2014).
[B] Yes I love Annabelle as well. That is a good movie.
[A] I never knew a doll could be so scary.
[B] Me either. But I love scary movies. What other movies do you like to watch?
[A] Funny movies! LIke Girls Trip (2017). What about you.
[B] Yes I love that movie. I never get tired of watching it. I like certain action movies li-03i25. I like certain action movies like Fast & Furious  (2009).
[A] Me too! I love all those movies. I also like Wonder Woman  (2017).
[B] Yes Wonder Woman  (2017) is a good movie too.
[A] And also Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017).
[B] I haven't seen that movie yet.
